name: result_scenes
description: Two rich result scene illustrations, one family, each a self-contained vignette on a soft circular scenic backdrop: WIN — the radiant gold burst medal with laurel, star shining, in front of a soft teal-mint sunburst backdrop with gentle confetti and two large sparkles; FAIL — the same medal cracked and dimmed to pewter, slumped slightly, in front of a muted slate-blue backdrop with a small rain cloud and soft falling drops.
prompt_extra: the scenic backdrop is a soft-edged circle BEHIND the medal, fully inside the cell; one clear silhouette per cell; same medal design in both cells
